sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n110519" key="fe/nagma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φέναγμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, (as if from <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Φενάσσω</foreign>) <sense id="n110519.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">φενάκισμα</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phot.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
